title: No Leg Indent
body:
!Warning this project has been Abandoned!
-----------------------------------------

Ever been annoyed of the little indent the player's and other mob's leg's, well this mod removes this.

Optifine is not supported yet

Before:

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZIyCKiFP/images/b311a6d4317cadad7e9b72bfc719997ec75dcbb5.png)

After:

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZIyCKiFP/images/76ceed75d0183e44b656c30d9301509b4b50220b.png)
